name: Blocks and Bones
short_description: Blocks and Bones is a zombie wave shooter with endless hordes of the undead in custom maps built by players. Build mode is the sandbox side of the game where you build levels from blocks and publish them online in-game so other players can survive the apocalypse inside your chilling creations.
detailed_description:
In Blocks and Bones, you get to be the one man army against endless hordes of zombies.
You also get to be the architect behind the scenes, building levels block by block to give
other players a gruesome experience.

Zombie Mode

Zombie mode is where the action is. Battle waves of the undead until you can't take it anymore.
Buy better weapons, unlock new areas, place turrets and explore the environments built by people all around the world.

Then, for the ones who like to pull the strings, theres:

Build Mode

Build Mode is where this game's unlimited supply of zombie ridden custom maps come from.
It breaks 'level editor' down into block shaped chunks by letting you craft a world in a voxel based sandbox and instantly share your creations in-game.

Online Features

  • Download custom levels from the main menu
  • Publish your levels instantly
  • No moving files or manually uploading them
  • Build onto or change levels you download

Embrace the apocalypse, grit your teeth, and bring the dead back to life in Blocks and Bones. Can you survive the terror you create?
